en: not what you had in mind.
ko: 우리 지금 뭐 하는 거야? 있잖아, 여자 가방 속 물건만 봐도 많은 걸 알 수 있지만, 아마 네가 원하는 건 그게 아니겠지.

en: Mr. Incredible. No, it's all right. I've got him. Sure, you've got him.
ko: 미스터 인크레더블. 아니, 괜찮아. 내가 잡았으니까.

en: I just took him out for you., Sure, you took him out., His attention was on me.
ko: 그걸 이용해서 내 일을 한 거지.

en: A fact I exploited to do my job., My job, you mean.
A simple thank you will suffice., Thanks, but I don't need any help.
Whatever happened to ladies first?, Well, whatever happened to equal treatment?
Hey, look, wait., The lady got me first., Well, we could share you., I work alone.
Well, I think you need to be more...flexible.
I'm not flexible. I'm flexible. I'm flexible. I'm flexible. I'm flexible. I'm flexible. I'm flexible.
ko: 나는 유연하지 않아. 나는 유연해. 나는 유연해. 나는 유연해. 나는 유연해. 나는 유연해. 나는 유연해.

en: I'm flexible. I'm flexible. I'm flexible. Be more...flexible.
ko: 나는 유연해. 나는 유연해. 더 유연해져.

en: Are you doing anything later? I have a previous engagement.
ko: 나중에 시간 있어? 이미 선약이 있어서.
